title: mischocarpus exangulatus
intro: Mischocarpus exangulatus, also known as the Australian quandong or bitter quandong, is a plant species native to Western Australia. It is a tree or shrub that produces a fruit with medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The fruit has been used in traditional medicine for various health benefits, such as treating digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory conditions, and it may also have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Mischocarpus exangulatus include teas, tinctures, and powders, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
